title: PromiseEval - Promise Verification in Political Discourse
description: Verification of political promises, requiring annotators to identify whether promises were made, kept, or broken based on political statements and context. Based on SemEval-2025 Task 6.

author.name: Nakov et al.
author.affiliation: Mohamed bin Zayed University of AI
